name: Aaron Wu
headline: Building High-Throughput, Low-Latency Distributed Systems for AI.
subHeadline: I'm Aaron Wu. Heavily inspired by system design literature, I focus on turning complex ML research into production code and building high-concurrency infrastructure to protect AI services from traffic spikes.
status: 🚀 Actively looking for Summer 2026 Internships or 2027 New Grad roles in Backend Engineering, AI Infrastructure, and Distributed Systems.
